title: alchemilla pubescens var. lapeyrousii
intro: Alchemilla pubescens var. lapeyrousii, also known as the lady's mantle, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Rosaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The plant's medicinal properties also provide health benefits, including reducing menstrual cramps, regulating menstrual cycles, and soothing digestive issues. Alchemilla pubescens var. lapeyrousii is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion for its medicinal uses.
